Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Okay, I think that does it for the gyoza filling.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I thought it might be nice to add some texture, so I made sure there's plenty of vegetables mixed in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I'm a little worried, but I wanted to give it a try.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}We went by the book for the seasoning, so it shouldn't turn out too different.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Yes, it'll be fine. We went by the book for the seasoning. And besides...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I think it's more fun if we have something new to try, regardless of whether it works or not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Oh, um... There's plenty of meat too![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}But there wasn't quite enough, so just try and pretend the vegetables are meat too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Next we have to put the filling in the wrappers, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Sorry I'm late! It was a long day of practice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Oh, have you gotten pretty far already?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Welcome back! We were just starting on the wrappers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I invited Yukari-chan to join us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}We were talking about cooking the other day, and she seemed really interested.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I mean, you almost never invite me to something like this, Fuuka.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Have you changed recently, or is it just me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}You just seem more at ease now. Or maybe it's more confidence? Don't you think so, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Yeah, see? That's what I thought.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Really? Well, I'm glad if that's the case.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun's been helping me a lot recently.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}And been really supportive of me. So I think maybe that's why.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}What's that supposed to mean? Sounds like you know something I don't.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Um, {f 4 1}-kun's just been there for me a lot recently.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}He helped me see I had a real opportunity to change.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}{f 4 1}-kun... You haven't been... making moves on Fuuka, have you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}He was just helping me as a friend! That's all, really![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Well, I trust Fuuka, so I guess you're in the clear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}But if you weren't, you'd be eating my fist, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}W-Well, everyone has their own strengths.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}And I'm sure Junpei-kun has plenty of things he's good at too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Not that I'd ever say that to his face though. It'd go straight to his head.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}Oh, the gyoza wrappers are going to dry out. Let's start wrapping, shall we?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone finished wrapping the[n]gyoza, and then we started cooking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can hear them crackling pleasantly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The gyoza are finished! They look delicious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}The flavor and texture are perfect! I think this is the best gyoza I've ever had.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}There's plenty more white rice if you want too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Sorry! I actually gotta get going.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}I've gotta clean my archery uniform before tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Oh, you can leave my dishes! I'll clean them when I get back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}You don't have to worry about that. Besides, we'll save on water if we do them all at once.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I'll make sure I can stick around till the end next time! But thanks for having me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}Did you notice she said, "next time"?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}I was a little nervous at first, but I'm glad I challenged myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}I have something I wanted to give you, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}You're always listening to music, so I thought you might like these.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}And I think you were a fan of this design, so I tried to match it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I replaced my old headphones[n]with the ones Fuuka gave me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The sound quality is unbelievably clear![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Her technical skills must be next-level.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}Remember how I told you I was pretty good with machines? Well, how are they?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}Actually, I've decided I want to become more accepting of myself. I want to be able to say I'm proud of who I am.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}And I think this is the first step to reaching that goal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}I'm going to be more confident in the things I'm good at.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}I hope you're happy with them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense Fuuka cares about me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we've forged a powerful bond...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The High Priestess Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Scathach{f 0 1 27}, the instructor![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}But I'm not going to give up on cooking either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}I'll embrace the things I'm good at, but also find more things I can do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}I'm going to change, one step at a time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 70 0 0}Oh, if there's anything you decide you want to try doing, {f 4 1}-kun, just let me know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I had a good time eating[n]gyoza and talking with Fuuka.[n]{f 1 1}
